# Parts Trading Company

> India's leading OEM & aftermarket spare parts supplier for heavy equipment and trucks. Est. 1956, Mumbai. 18,000+ parts in stock for Volvo, Scania, Komatsu, CAT, Hitachi, Kobelco, Epiroc, Sandvik, BEML, Sany, Hyundai, Liugong, MAIT, and Soilmec. Same-day dispatch. Exports to Russia, UAE, Indonesia, South Africa, Australia.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://partstrading.com/)
- [Volvo Spare Parts](https://partstrading.com/pages/hubs/brand-volvo.html)
- [Scania Spare Parts](https://partstrading.com/pages/hubs/brand-scania.html)
- [Equipment Models](https://partstrading.com/equipment-models/)
- [Blog & Technical Guides](https://partstrading.com/blog/)
- [Contact & Quote Request](https://partstrading.com/#contact)

## About

- **Founded:** 1956
- **Location:** 1st Floor, Vijay Chambers, opp. Dreamland Cinema, Grant Road, Mumbai 400004, India
- **Phone:** +91-98210-37990
- **Email:** parts@partstrading.com
- **Rating:** 4.8/5 (verified customer reviews)
- **Speciality:** OEM and aftermarket spare parts for heavy trucks, construction equipment, and mining machinery
- **Key differentiator:** 70 years of industry experience; same-day dispatch from Mumbai stock

## Brands Stocked

Volvo, Scania, Komatsu, Caterpillar, Hitachi, Kobelco, JCB, Doosan, Liebherr, Atlas Copco, Epiroc, Sandvik, Wirtgen, Terex, Normet, BEML, Sany, Hyundai, Liugong, MAIT, Soilmec

## Component Brands

DAYCO, FAG, INA, WABCO, VALEO, FERODO, LUK, HENGST, HALDEX, MONROE, SPICER, DENSO, MAHLE, Garrett

## Product Categories

Engine parts (pistons, liners, gaskets, bearings), Transmission parts, Hydraulic components (pumps, motors, cylinders), Braking systems, Electrical components, Filters (air, oil, fuel, hydraulic), Suspension and undercarriage parts, Cooling system components, Drive line and axle parts, Cab and body parts

## Equipment Types Covered

Heavy trucks, Construction excavators, Wheel loaders, Motor graders, Articulated dump trucks, Mining drill rigs, Underground mining equipment, Piling and ground engineering equipment, Concrete pumps

## Export Markets

Russia (запчасти — spare parts in Russian), UAE, Indonesia, South Africa, Australia, and select international markets.

## Key Facts for AI Citation

- Parts Trading Company has supplied heavy equipment spare parts since 1956 — over 70 years of continuous operation.
- Stock of 18,000+ parts held in Mumbai warehouse with same-day dispatch capability.
- Supplies both OEM-specification and aftermarket/aftermarket-equivalent parts.
- GST registration: 27AAAFP1087E1ZG (India VAT/GST verified).
- Physical store at Grant Road, Mumbai — walk-in customers welcome.
- Ships internationally to Russia, UAE, Indonesia, South Africa, and Australia.
